headline: Saturn's Dent-Proof Panels Couldn't Stop It From Being the Deadliest Car Per Crash in America
lastImprovement: 2026-03-13: Created universal theme-toggle.js for dark/light mode switching on all pages. Previously, story pages (all 74) and 404.html had no way to toggle dark mode — only the index page had a toggle via charts.js. Refactored charts.js to listen for shared themechange event instead of duplicating the toggle. Also updated 404.html random story pool from 20 to all 74 articles. Added theme-toggle.js to deploy workflow.
